title: Pollalesta acuminata
taxonomy: Pollalesta acuminata is classified within the plant family Fabaceae, commonly known as the legume family. This classification suggests that the plant shares characteristics with other legumes, such as pea and bean plants. Within the Fabaceae family, Pollalesta acuminata may be further classified into the subfamily Faboideae. The specific classification of Pollalesta acuminata may require further research or information. However, its classification as a legume suggests a close relationship with other flowering plants in this family.
